candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; appears immediately below revenue and before operating overhead lines.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line most consistent with cost of sales.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead component.
Broad overhead bucket, but appears to be a subtotal of more granular other operating expense components in some years.
Granular operating overhead component within other operating expenses.
Explicit SG&A-type overhead component.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses key granular overhead rows present in the full preview. 'Other Operating Expenses' is a subtotal in 2024-2021 because it equals the sum of 'External Expenses - Third Parties - Other' + 'Sales and Marketing Expense' + 'Rental Expense' + 'Other Operating Expense', so components were preferred per rules. Added 'Rental Expense' and 'Other Operating Expense' from the full A-column preview; manual review needed because 2025 shows only the subtotal populated, so component coverage may be incomplete for that year. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Other Operating Expense
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the income statement preview.

Finance costs but not specifically interest.

candidates.why: Component of equity, not total book equity.

variables.notes: Using equity priority list. No separate parent-only equity or non-controlling interest line is shown; 'Total Shareholders Equity' is preferred, with 'Total Equity' as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority interest/non-controlling interests appears in the preview. Therefore MIB is treated as not present.
